# LTO EXAM REVIEWER 2023

1. While driving, you should look at your side and rear view mirror:

- Quickly
- If you want
- Not less than once per one minute

Answer: A. Quickly

2. You can overtake in the right side of your vehicle if:

- The road has two or more lanes going in one direction
- The road is two-way
- The sidewalk is wide

Answer: A. The road has two or more lanes going in one direction

3. A person who drives while under influence of alcohol or drugs is punishable by law with:

- Suspension of license
- Fines and imprisonment
- All answers are correct

Answer: C. All answers are correct

4. Before leaving the parking area, you should:

- Look around first
- Sound your horn
- Immediately go

Answer: A. Look around first

5. The minimum age in the application for Non-Professional Driver's License is:

- 18 years old
- 16 years old
- 17 years old

Answer: C. 17 years old

6. After overtaking, you want to safely go back to the lane where you where you came from, you should:

- Use the rear view mirror to check the vehicle you have overtaken
- Look at the vehicle you have overtaken by turning your head
- Stop

Answer: A. Use the rear view mirror to check the vehicle you have overtaken

7. In an intersection with a STOP sign, you should:

- Slow down and proceed if there is no danger
- Stop and proceed if there is no danger
- Give way to vehicles going from left and right, proceed if there is no danger

Answer: B. Stop and proceed if there is no danger

8. Obtaining a driver's license is:

- An honor
- A privilege
- A right

Answer: B. A privilege

9. A Non-Professional driver's license is suited for:

- Private vehicles
- Public utility vehicles
- All types of vehicles

Answer: A. Private vehicles

10. What should you prepare for a long trip?

- Prepare the necessary tools that can be used to repair the vehicle
- Plan your route and make sure the vehicle is running in good condition
- All answers are correct

Answer: C. All answers are correct

11. When parking uphill and parallel to the sidewalk, you should turn the wheel:

○ To the sidewalk curb
○ Away from the sidewalk curb
○ Parallel with the sidewalk curb

Answer: B. Away from the sidewalk curb

12. The vehicle is parked if:

○ The vehicle is not moving while unloading passengers
○ The vehicle is not moving while loading passengers
○ The vehicle is stationary with the engine turned off

Answer: C. The vehicle is stationary with the engine turned off

13. What is the meaning of blinking red traffic light?

○ Wait for the green signal
○ Slow down and proceed if there is no danger ahead
○ Stop and proceed if there is no danger ahead

Answer: C. Stop and proceed if there is no danger ahead

14. What should you do before turning left or right?

○ Immediately turn and sound your horn
○ Give signal not less than 30 meters before turning
○ Ignore giving a signal

Answer: B. Give signal not less than 30 meters before turning

15. While changing lanes, you should give signal, check your rear view mirror and:

○ Watch out for oncoming vehicles
○ Sound your horn
○ Turn on the vehicle's headlight

Answer: A. Watch out for oncoming vehicles

16. You can overtake in a highway if it has two lanes with:

○ Continuous white line

○ Broken yellow line
○ Continuous yellow line

Answer: B. Broken yellow line

17. Not following road and traffic rules:

○ Proves that you are a good driver
○ May engage you in an accident
○ Saves fuel

Answer: B. May engage you in an accident

18. It is more dangerous to turn left than to turn right because:

○ Vehicles coming from left is faster
○ You have to be aware and cautious from vehicles coming from left or right sides of the road
○ The road has more lanes

Answer: B. You have to be aware and cautious from vehicles coming from left or right sides of the road

19. The safest response even if you have rights on the road is:

○ Don't force your rights
○ Sound your horn
○ Force your rights

Answer: A. Don't force your rights

20. In a roundabout (rotunda), which has road rights?

○ The vehicles approaching the roundabout
○ The vehicles in the roundabout
○ The vehicles facing the green light

Answer: B. The vehicles in the roundabout

21. You are not allowed to overtake at the foot bridge because:

○ People are crossing
○ You cannot see oncoming vehicles

○ The bridge is narrow

Answer: B. You cannot see oncoming vehicles

22. What is the meaning of blinking yellow traffic light?

- Slow down and proceed if there is no danger
- Stop and wait for the traffic light to change
- Wait for the green light

Answer: A. Slow down and proceed if there is no danger

23. What is the meaning of continuous yellow line in the road?

- You are allowed to overtake
- It is prohibited to overtake
- All answers are correct

Answer: B. It is prohibited to overtake

24. According to the law, you are not allowed to drive fast, except when:

- There is no danger in the road
- Speed is in accordance with the given speed limit
- All answers are correct

Answer: C. All answers are correct

25. Having a license means you can drive:

- All types of vehicle
- Vehicles allowed indicated in your license
- Public utility vehicle only

Answer: B. Vehicles allowed indicated in your license

26. If a vehicle in front of you has a high beam light which is blinding your vision, what should you do?

○ Switch your headlight on high also

- Do not look at glaring light, quickly look on the right side of the road
- Stare at the glaring light

Answer: B. Do not look at glaring light, quickly look on the right side of the road

27. If you are approaching a curve, what should you do?

- Slow down
- Speed up
- Abruptly push the brake

Answer: A. Slow down

28. What is the meaning of a triangle traffic sign with red border color?

- Reminder sign
- Warning sign
- Information sign

Answer: B. Warning sign

29. What is the meaning of a square or rectangle traffic sign with blue and white color?

- Giving direction
- Warning sign
- Information sign

Answer: C. Information sign

30. What is the meaning of a circle, octagon or inverted triangle traffic sign with red border color?

- Regulatory sign
- Warning sign
- Giving direction

Answer: A. Regulatory sign

31. What is the meaning of green traffic light?

- Go signal for the vehicle
- Stop at the given line
- You are allowed to proceed by slowing down

Answer: A. Signal to start the vehicle moving

32. What is the meaning of blinking red traffic light?

- ○ Stop at the given line
- ○ Stop for a while and continue if there is no danger
- ○ Drive faster

Answer: B. Stop for a while and continue if there is no danger

33. What is the meaning of yellow traffic light?

- ○ Stop
- ○ Prepare to stop, red traffic light is about to light up
- ○ You can go, but slow down

Answer: B. Prepare to stop, red traffic light is about to light up

34. What is the meaning of green traffic light?

- ○ The vehicle should not stop
- ○ The vehicle should stop
- ○ The vehicle should slow down

Answer: A. The vehicle should not stop

35. What is the meaning of green arrow traffic light?

- ○ It is prohibited to enter on the direction of the arrow
- ○ Allowing vehicles to go right or left
- ○ Pedestrians can cross

Answer: B. Allowing vehicles to go right or left

36. What is the meaning of yellow arrow traffic light?

- ○ Giving signal for right or left direction
- ○ The red arrow traffic light is about to light up
- ○ Allowing vehicles to go left, right or straight

Answer: B. The red arrow traffic light is about to light up

37. What are white lines in the road for?

- ○ Divides lanes going in one direction

- ○ Separates traffic going in one direction
- ○ Sign that you can go left or right

Answer: B. Separates traffic going in one direction

38. Broken yellow line on the road means:

- ○ You are allowed to overtake on the right side
- ○ It is prohibited to overtake on the left or right side
- ○ You are allowed to overtake on the left side

Answer: C. You are allowed to overtake on the left side

39. Broken white line on the road means:

- ○ You are allowed to overtake on left or right side if there is no danger
- ○ It is prohibited to overtake on the left side
- ○ It is prohibited to overtake on the right side

Answer: A. You are allowed to overtake on left or right side if there is no danger

40. When should a driver make a decision?

- ○ If there is a heavy traffic
- ○ If he is a good driver
- ○ While driving to anticipate other driver's actions

Answer: C. While driving to anticipate other driver's actions

41. A continuous parallel double yellow line on the road means:

- ○ You are allowed to overtake on the right side
- ○ It is dangerous to overtake
- ○ You are allowed to overtake on the left side

Answer: B. It is dangerous to overtake

42. If the driver of a vehicle in front of you is giving a hand signal by pointing his left hand upwards, he will surely:

○ Turn left
○ Turn right
○ Stop

Answer: B. Turn right

43. A driver should give a signal when turning left or right on the road intersection in no less than:

○ 15 meters
○ 60 meters
○ 30 meters

Answer: C. 30 meters

44. Before changing lanes on a highway, you must give a signal for:

○ Ten seconds before doing it
○ Five minutes before doing it
○ One minute before doing it

Answer: A. Ten seconds before doing it

45. When riding a motorcycle and you would like to turn right, you should signal with:

○ Your left hand pointing upward
○ Your right hand pointing to the right
○ Your right hand pointing upward

Answer: A. Your left hand pointing upward

46. The necessary distance in between you and a vehicle you are following should be:

○ The same length as three full vehicles
○ The same length as a full vehicle
○ The same length as two full vehicles

Answer: B. The same length as a full vehicle

47. Which place you should not overtake?

○ In an intersection
○ At the foot of the bridge

○ All answers are correct

Answer: C. All answers are correct

48. Driving with a fake license is prohibited and punishable by:

○ Php 1,500.00 and six months suspension in obtaining a license
○ Not more than six months imprisonment
○ Php 300.00

Answer: A. Php 1,500.00 and six months suspension in obtaining a license

49. What should you do if a policeman stops you?

○ Stop and give the license and other papers for the vehicle if the policeman asks for it.
○ Don't mind the cop and drive faster.
○ Stop and argue with the policeman.

Answer: A. Stop and give the license and other papers for the vehicle if the policeman asks for it.

50. Double broken yellow line in the road means:

○ It is prohibited to overtake on the left side
○ You are allowed to overtake on the left or right side if there is no danger
○ It is prohibited to overtake on the right side

Answer: B. You are allowed to overtake on the left or right side of the road if there is no danger

51. If the driver of the vehicle in front of you is stretching his left arm out and gives you a hand signal pointing to the left, he will:

○ Turn right
○ Stop
○ Turn left

Answer: Answer: C. Turn left

52. If the brake light of the vehicle in front of you lights up, you should:

○ Depress the horn
○ Prepare to push the brake
○ Turn right or left

Answer: B. Prepare to push the brake

53. The vehicle horn is used for:

○ Creating noise
○ Making beautiful sounds
○ Giving warning to avoid accident

Answer: C. Giving warning to avoid accident

54. If you are involved in an accident, you should inform the nearest police station:

○ Within 72 hours
○ Immediately
○ Within 48 hours

Answer: B. Immediately

55. The minimum age for the applicant of Professional Driver's License is:

○ 18 years old
○ 17 years old
○ 21 years old

Answer: A. 18 years old

56. The safest speed of a vehicle is according to:

○ Road and weather conditions
○ Condition of the vehicle
○ Capability of the driver

Answer: A. Road and weather conditions

57. What should you do to combat fatigue and sleepiness during long road trip?

○ Drink alcohol before driving
○ Stop every once in a while and rest
○ Drink medicine that prevents sleepiness

Answer: B. Stop every once in a while and rest

58. A driver is considered a Professional driver if:

○ He/she can drive any vehicle
○ He/she is paid or earns money while driving a private or public vehicle
○ He/she is a driving expert

Answer: B. He/she is paid or earns money while driving a private or public vehicle

59. There are two incoming vehicles on both sides of the street of an intersection with no traffic light, which vehicle should give way?

○ The first one to arrive
○ The first one to slow down
○ The last one to arrive

Answer: C. The last one to arrive

60. If the driver of a vehicle in front of you is giving a hand signal and is pointing his hand to the ground, he is:

○ Stopping
○ Turning right
○ Turning left

Answer: A. Stopping

61. If you are caught due to a violation, how many days are given for you to settle your case and get your license back?

○ 30 days
○ 15 days
○ 10 days

Answer: B. 15 days

62. What is the maximum speed of a vehicle entering a school zone?

○ 35 kph
○ 20 kph
○ 30 kph

Answer: B. 20 kph

63. In which place you are prohibited to park?

○ In a pedestrian crossing
○ In a given parking space

○ In a certain place you want to go

Answer: A. In a pedestrian crossing

64. If you want to drive slower than other vehicles on a highway you should stay on the:

- ○ Right lane
- ○ Left lane
- ○ Middle lane

Answer: A. Right lane

65. What should a driver take action if his/her driver's license was lost?

- ○ Apply for a duplicate license
- ○ Apply for a new license
- ○ File an affidavit of loss and apply for a duplicate license

Answer: C. File an affidavit of loss and apply for a duplicate license

66. A continuous single yellow line on the road means:

- ○ You can overtake on the left or right side
- ○ It is prohibited to overtake on the right side
- ○ It is prohibited to overtake on the left side

Answer: C. It is prohibited to overtake on the left side

67. A red flag or red light should be attached to any vehicle cargo that exceeds:

- ○ One meter from the back of the car
- ○ Three meters from the back of the car
- ○ Two meters from the back of the car

Answer: A. One meter from the back of the car

68. What should you bring before driving a vehicle?

- ○ Driver's license, vehicle registration, and receipt of last LTO payment for the vehicle
- ○ Driver's license

○ Driver's license and vehicle insurance paper

Answer: A. Driver's license, vehicle registration, and receipt of last LTO payment for the vehicle

69. If you are going to drive slow on expressway, you should move on the:

- ○ Middle lane
- ○ Right lane
- ○ Left lane

Answer: B. Right lane

70. What should you do if the vehicle behind you wants to overtake your vehicle?

- ○ Stay on the right and stop
- ○ Slow down, stay on the right, and let it overtake
- ○ Sound your horn and let it pass

Answer: B. Slow down, stay on the right, and let it overtake

71. You are not allowed to cross a lane with continuous yellow line on the road except if you are:

- ○ Turning left
- ○ Turning right
- ○ Changing lanes

Answer: A. Turning left

72. Driving without license is against the law and punishable with a fine of:

- ○ Php 1000.00
- ○ Php 1500 and the vehicle will be impounded up to 10 days
- ○ Php 1500.00

Answer: C. Php 1500.00

73. There are two incoming vehicles on the street of an intersection with no traffic light, which vehicle has the right of way?

- ○ The vehicle from the right side
- ○ The vehicle that slows down first

○ The vehicle from the left side

Answer: A. The vehicle from the right side

74. What is the meaning of an arrow painted on the road?

○ Follow the direction painted on the road
○ Slow down
○ You are allowed to change lanes

Answer: A. Follow the direction painted on the road

75. What should you do when an ambulance comes up behind you flashing red lights and/or sounding its siren?

○ Stop as soon as possible
○ Speed up so that you don't hold the ambulance
○ Pull over to the right and slow down or even stop if necessary

Answer: C. Pull over to the right and slow down or even stop if necessary

76. Which of the following describes the picture:

![chunk-0-img-0.jpeg](data:image/jpeg;base64,)

○ No entry
○ Give way
○ Stop

Answer: B. Give Way

77. Which of the following describes the picture:

![chunk-0-img-1.jpeg](data:image/jpeg;base64,)

○ Priority crossroads
○ Sharp turn to the right
○ Sharp turn to the left

Answer: C. Sharp turn to the left

78. Which of the following describes the picture:

![chunk-0-img-2.jpeg](data:image/jpeg;base64,)

○ Priority side junction
○ Priority merge on the right
○ Priority side junction on the right

Answer: B. Priority merge on the right

79. Which of the following describes the picture:

![chunk-0-img-3.jpeg](data:image/jpeg;base64,)

○ No parking
○ No blowing of horns
○ No U-turn

Answer: B. No blowing of horns

80. Which of the following describes the picture:

![chunk-0-img-4.jpeg](data:image/jpeg;base64,)

○ Slippery road
○ Road widens
○ Road narrows

Answer: C. Road narrows

81. Which of the following describes the picture:

![chunk-0-img-5.jpeg](data:image/jpeg;base64,)

○ Steep descent
○ Steep road

○ Steep ascent

Answer: C. Steep ascent

82. Which of the following describes the picture:

![chunk-0-img-6.jpeg](data:image/jpeg;base64,)

○ Steep road
○ Road under construction
○ Quayside or river bank

Answer: C. Quayside or river bank

83. Which of the following describes the picture:

![chunk-0-img-7.jpeg](data:image/jpeg;base64,)

○ Next intersection distance is 30 km
○ Width restriction
○ Given speed limit

Answer: C. Given speed limit

84. Which of the following describes the picture:

![chunk-0-img-8.jpeg](data:image/jpeg;base64,)

○ Dangerous curve to the right
○ Dangerous curve to the left
○ Dangerous bend

Answer: C. Dangerous bend

85. Which of the following describes the picture:

![chunk-0-img-9.jpeg](data:image/jpeg;base64,)

○ No entry
○ Stop
○ Give way

Answer: B. Stop

86. Which of the following describes the picture:

![chunk-0-img-10.jpeg](data:image/jpeg;base64,)

○ No entry for train
○ Railroad crossing advance warning
○ Warning intersection

Answer: B. Railroad crossing advance warning

87. Which of the following describes the picture:

![chunk-0-img-11.jpeg](data:image/jpeg;base64,)

○ No entry for jeepney
○ No entry for bus
○ No entry for car

Answer: A. No entry for jeepney

88. Which of the following describes the picture:

![chunk-0-img-12.jpeg](data:image/jpeg;base64,)

○ Bumpy road

○ Road under construction
○ Slippery road

Answer: B. Road under construction

89. Which of the following describes the picture:

![chunk-0-img-13.jpeg](data:image/jpeg;base64,)

○ Railroad crossing advance warning
○ School zone/Children crossing
○ Hospital zone

Answer: B. School zone/Children crossing

90. Which of the following describes the picture:

![chunk-0-img-14.jpeg](data:image/jpeg;base64,)

○ No entry for car
○ No entry for bus
○ No entry for power-driven vehicles drawing a trailer

Answer: C. No entry for power-driven vehicles drawing a trailer

91. Which of the following describes the picture:

![chunk-0-img-15.jpeg](data:image/jpeg;base64,)

○ Double turn to the left
○ Double turn to the right
○ Double turn ahead

Answer: A. Double turn to the left

92. Which of the following describes the picture:

![chunk-0-img-16.jpeg](data:image/jpeg;base64,)

○ Animals are prohibited to cross
○ Animal cage
○ Animal crossing

Answer: C. Animal crossing

93. Which of the following describes the picture:

![chunk-0-img-17.jpeg](data:image/jpeg;base64,)

○ Slippery road
○ Bumpy road
○ Steep road

Answer: B. Bumpy road

94. Which of the following describes the picture:

![chunk-0-img-18.jpeg](data:image/jpeg;base64,)

○ No left turn
○ One-way traffic
○ No entry

Answer: C. No entry

95. Which of the following describes the picture:

![chunk-0-img-19.jpeg](data:image/jpeg;base64,)

○ Priority crossroads
○ First aid station

○ Railroad crossing

Answer: A. Priority crossroads

96. Which of the following describes the picture:

![chunk-0-img-20.jpeg](data:image/jpeg;base64,)

○ No entry for trucks
○ No entry for bus
○ No entry for car

Answer: A. No entry for trucks

97. Which of the following describes the picture:

![chunk-0-img-21.jpeg](data:image/jpeg;base64,)

○ Do not enter
○ Do not enter if the vehicle is more than 2 meters wide
○ Do not enter if the vehicle is 2 meters wide

Answer: B. Do not enter if the vehicle is more than 2 meters wide

98. Which of the following describes the picture:

![chunk-0-img-22.jpeg](data:image/jpeg;base64,)

○ No parking
○ Do not blow your horn
○ No entry

Answer: A. No parking

99. Which of the following describes the picture:

![chunk-0-img-23.jpeg](data:image/jpeg;base64,)

○ Road under construction
○ Steep road
○ Beware of falling rocks

Answer: C. Beware of falling rocks

100. Which of the following describes the picture:

![chunk-0-img-24.jpeg](data:image/jpeg;base64,)

○ Steep road
○ Slippery road
○ Bumpy road

Answer: B. Slippery road
